title: Deliciously Spicy Brazilian Chicken Wrap
description: A spicy and cozy Brazilian dish featuring almond butter and flambe, wrapped in a pandan leaf wrap, perfect for a Mediterranean-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat and add the olive oil.
Add the chicken breast strips and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the sliced red onion and red bell pepper to the skillet and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together the almond butter and flambe sauce until smooth.
Add the almond butter mixture to the skillet and stir to combine with the chicken and vegetables.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Warm the pandan leaves by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by spooning the chicken and vegetable mixture onto a pandan leaf and topping with crumbly feta cheese.
